name: 走廊监控影像打印件
structure: 单张横向监控定格打印件，正面是酒店走廊昏黄灯光与健一背影，右下角有时间码，背面为纯白相纸，无图像、无文字、无花纹
reference_context_policy: isolated product view on neutral background
reference_prompt: A4-sized semi-matte photo paper print, front side: horizontal surveillance still from hotel corridor under dim yellow lighting showing Tanaka Kenichi's back as he walks away, grayscale blue low-saturation image, blurred unreadable timecode in bottom right corner; back side: plain white photo paper with no images, text, or patterns.。源记录硬约束：数量:1张打印件；位置:首帧位于指纹报告右侧，边缘压在报告旁；运动政策:保持静止

source_contract.position: 首帧位于指纹报告右侧，边缘压在报告旁
